name: chrome-devtools
description: Chrome DevTools MCP — 網頁除錯、效能分析、DOM 操作、Lighthouse

cachedTools.name: click
cachedTools.description: Clicks on the provided element

cachedTools.name: close_page
cachedTools.description: Closes the page by its index. The last open page cannot be closed.

cachedTools.name: drag
cachedTools.description: Drag an element onto another element

cachedTools.name: emulate
cachedTools.description: Emulates various features on the selected page.

cachedTools.name: evaluate_script
cachedTools.description:
Evaluate a JavaScript function inside the currently selected page. Returns the response as JSON,
so returned values have to be JSON-serializable.

cachedTools.name: fill
cachedTools.description: Type text into a input, text area or select an option from a <select> element.

cachedTools.name: fill_form
cachedTools.description: Fill out multiple form elements at once

cachedTools.name: get_console_message
cachedTools.description: Gets a console message by its ID. You can get all messages by calling list_console_messages.

cachedTools.name: get_network_request
cachedTools.description: Gets a network request by an optional reqid, if omitted returns the currently selected request in the DevTools Network panel.

cachedTools.name: handle_dialog
cachedTools.description: If a browser dialog was opened, use this command to handle it

cachedTools.name: hover
cachedTools.description: Hover over the provided element

cachedTools.name: lighthouse_audit
cachedTools.description: Get Lighthouse score and reports for accessibility, SEO and best practices. This excludes performance. For performance audits, run performance_start_trace

cachedTools.name: list_console_messages
cachedTools.description: List all console messages for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

cachedTools.name: list_network_requests
cachedTools.description: List all requests for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

cachedTools.name: list_pages
cachedTools.description: Get a list of pages  open in the browser.

cachedTools.name: navigate_page
cachedTools.description: Go to a URL, or back, forward, or reload. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

cachedTools.name: new_page
cachedTools.description: Open a new tab and load a URL. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

cachedTools.name: performance_analyze_insight
cachedTools.description: Provides more detailed information on a specific Performance Insight of an insight set that was highlighted in the results of a trace recording.

cachedTools.name: performance_start_trace
cachedTools.description: Start a performance trace on the selected webpage. Use to find frontend performance issues, Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), and improve page load speed.

cachedTools.name: performance_stop_trace
cachedTools.description: Stop the active performance trace recording on the selected webpage.

cachedTools.name: press_key
cachedTools.description: Press a key or key combination. Use this when other input methods like fill() cannot be used (e.g., keyboard shortcuts, navigation keys, or special key combinations).

cachedTools.name: resize_page
cachedTools.description: Resizes the selected page's window so that the page has specified dimension

cachedTools.name: select_page
cachedTools.description: Select a page as a context for future tool calls.

cachedTools.name: take_memory_snapshot
cachedTools.description: Capture a memory heapsnapshot of the currently selected page to memory leak debugging

cachedTools.name: take_screenshot
cachedTools.description: Take a screenshot of the page or element.

cachedTools.name: take_snapshot
cachedTools.description:
Take a text snapshot of the currently selected page based on the a11y tree. The snapshot lists page elements along with a unique
identifier (uid). Always use the latest snapshot. Prefer taking a snapshot over taking a screenshot. The snapshot indicates the element selected
in the DevTools Elements panel (if any).

cachedTools.name: type_text
cachedTools.description: Type text using keyboard into a previously focused input

cachedTools.name: upload_file
cachedTools.description: Upload a file through a provided element.

cachedTools.name: wait_for
cachedTools.description: Wait for the specified text to appear on the selected page.
